# Config Reference

<!-- This file is generated by `bun run gen-schema`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Top-Level

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `maintainers` | yes | array<object> |  | Known PreAUR maintainers. |
| `default_maintainer` | no | string |  | Maintainer id used when a package omits maintainer. |
| `git` | no | object | {} | Project repository automation. |
| `config` | no | object |  | Runtime behavior settings. |
| `resources` | no | object | {} | Build and check concurrency settings. |
| `repo` | no | object |  | Local pacman repository settings. |
| `packages` | yes | array<object> |  | Packages managed by PreAUR. |

### maintainers[]

A packager identity.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | yes | string |  | Stable maintainer id used by packages. |
| `name` | yes | string |  | Maintainer display name. |
| `email` | yes | string |  | Maintainer email address. |

### git

Project repository automation.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `enabled` | no | boolean | true | Enable project git automation. |
| `remote` | no | string | "origin" | Remote used for sync and push. |
| `branch` | no | string |  | Branch used for sync and push. Default: current branch. |
| `sync` | no | object | {} | Project git startup sync policy. |
| `push` | no | object | {} | Project git push policy. |

#### git.sync

Project git startup sync policy.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allow_remote_overwrite_local` | no | boolean | false | Reset local state to remote during sync. |
| `allowRemoteOverwriteLocal` | no | boolean |  | CamelCase alias for allow_remote_overwrite_local. |

#### git.push

Project git push policy.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `force` | no | boolean | false | Use git push --force after builds. |

### config

Runtime behavior settings.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pkgbuildParser` | no | native \| makepkg |  | PKGBUILD parser implementation. |
| `trustedAurGitPrefixes` | no | array<string> |  | Git URL prefixes treated as AUR package sources. |
| `pkgbuildSandbox` | no | object | {} | Chroot sandbox used for PKGBUILD metadata commands before building. |
| `chrootPacman` | no | object |  | Pacman configuration added to devtools chroots. |

#### config.pkgbuildSandbox

Chroot sandbox used for PKGBUILD metadata commands before building.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `enabled` | no | boolean | true | Run PKGBUILD metadata commands inside a chroot sandbox. |
| `root` | no | string |  | Chroot root directory. Defaults to the devtools root derived from the package builder. |
| `command` | no | string | "systemd-nspawn" | Sandbox command used to enter the chroot. |
| `sudo` | no | boolean | true | Run the sandbox command through sudo when PreAUR is not root. |
| `user` | no | string | "preaur" | User used inside the chroot for makepkg commands. It is created with the host UID when missing. |
| `network` | no | boolean | true | Allow network access inside the PKGBUILD sandbox. |
| `ephemeral` | no | boolean | true | Run metadata commands in a temporary chroot copy that is discarded after the command exits. |
| `initRoot` | no | boolean | true | Initialize a missing chroot root by running the package builder on a generated safe package. |
| `packages` | no | array<string> | [] | Extra packages installed in the temporary metadata chroot before running PKGBUILD commands. |

#### config.chrootPacman

Pacman configuration added to devtools chroots.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `include` | no | array<string> |  | Host files included into generated pacman.conf. |
| `lines` | no | array<string> |  | Raw pacman.conf lines appended globally. |
| `repositories` | no | array<object> |  | Custom chroot pacman repositories. |

##### config.chrootPacman.repositories[]

A custom pacman repository for chroot builds.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | yes | string |  | Pacman repository name. |
| `siglevel` | no | string \| array<string> |  | Repository SigLevel line. |
| `include` | no | array<string> |  | Host files included into this repository block. |
| `lines` | no | array<string> |  | Raw pacman.conf lines appended to this repository block. |

### resources

Build and check concurrency settings.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cpu` | no | string |  | CPU allocation passed to builders. |
| `parallel` | no | integer | 2 | Concurrent package builds. |
| `updateCheckCocurrent` | no | integer | 1 | Concurrent version checks. |

### repo

Local pacman repository settings.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | yes | string |  | Local pacman repository name. |

### packages[]

A package build entry.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pkgname` | yes | string |  | Local package name. |
| `maintainer` | no | string |  | Maintainer id. Defaults to default_maintainer. |
| `allow_orphan_package_build` | no | boolean |  | Allow building an orphan AUR package. |
| `aur_pkgname` | no | string |  | AUR package name when it differs from pkgname. |
| `git` | no | string |  | Package PKGBUILD git URL override. |
| `checker` | no | object |  | Upstream version checker. |
| `builder` | no | string |  | Build command such as extra-x86_64-build. |
| `push` | no | boolean |  | Push package PKGBUILD changes to AUR on success. |
| `dummy_packages` | no | array<object> |  | Dummy packages installed before build. |
| `repo_packages` | no | array<string> |  | Local repo packages required before this build. |
| `pre-build-packages` | no | array<string> |  | Packages installed in chroot before build. |
| `pre-build-scripts` | no | array<string> |  | Root scripts run in chroot before build. |
| `pre_build_packages` | no | array<string> |  | Alias for pre-build-packages. |
| `pre_build_scripts` | no | array<string> |  | Alias for pre-build-scripts. |

#### packages[].checker: github

GitHub version checker.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `strip_version` | no | boolean |  | Strip common version prefixes before comparison. |
| `normalize` | no | boolean |  | Normalize upstream version text. |
| `template` | no | string |  | Template mapping upstream version text to PKGBUILD variables. |
| `type` | yes | "github" |  | Use GitHub release data. |
| `repo` | yes | string |  | GitHub repository as owner/name. |
| `use` | no | string |  | Release selector such as release or prerelease. |
| `prefix` | no | string |  | Version tag prefix to strip. |
| `suffix` | no | string |  | Version tag suffix to strip. |

#### packages[].checker: deb

Debian repository version checker.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `strip_version` | no | boolean |  | Strip common version prefixes before comparison. |
| `normalize` | no | boolean |  | Normalize upstream version text. |
| `template` | no | string |  | Template mapping upstream version text to PKGBUILD variables. |
| `type` | yes | "deb" |  | Use a Debian Packages index. |
| `url` | yes | string |  | Repository base URL. |
| `pkg` | yes | string |  | Debian package name. |
| `dist` | yes | string |  | Debian distribution name. |
| `component` | yes | string |  | Debian repository component. |
| `arch` | no | string |  | Debian architecture. |

#### packages[].checker: rpm

RPM repository version checker.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `strip_version` | no | boolean |  | Strip common version prefixes before comparison. |
| `normalize` | no | boolean |  | Normalize upstream version text. |
| `template` | no | string |  | Template mapping upstream version text to PKGBUILD variables. |
| `type` | yes | "rpm" |  | Use an RPM repository. |
| `url` | yes | string |  | Repository base URL. |
| `pkg` | yes | string |  | RPM package name. |

#### packages[].dummy_packages[]

A generated dummy dependency package.

| Key | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dummy` | yes | string |  | Dummy package name. |
| `epoch` | no | string \| number |  | Dummy package epoch. |
| `pkgver` | no | string \| number |  | Dummy package version. |
| `pkgrel` | no | string \| number |  | Dummy package release. |
| `files` | no | array<string> |  | Files provided by the dummy package. |
